cgiSection.title: CGI systems for brands scaling product media in-house.
cgiSection.description: A focused look at product CGI, ecommerce rendering and media-library workflows for teams that need consistent visuals, faster campaign assets and stronger internal production systems.
cgiSection.employerPitch: This work shows the practical bridge between craft and production: product modeling, material accuracy, look development, rendering, post-processing, QA and reusable asset systems for ecommerce, launch campaigns and brand storytelling.
productionHighlights: Soft-material and furniture rendering experience for product-led ecommerce visuals
Pipeline thinking for repeated product launches, color/material variants and catalogue-scale ecommerce visuals
Media-library discipline for organizing assets so internal brand, performance and marketplace teams can reuse them faster

cases.title: Luxury Watch CGI & 3D Content Production
cases.client: Prestigious luxury watchmaker via CLX Europe
cases.summary: CGI and 3D workflows helped transform luxury watch content production with scalable asset creation, faster market delivery and consistent premium product visuals.
cases.caseStudy: The project focused on replacing slower, shoot-dependent luxury product content with a CGI-first approach that could support repeatable visual production while preserving premium product detail, material accuracy and brand consistency.
workflow: Understand product references, visual standards and market-delivery requirements
Prepare 3D assets, materials, lighting setups and camera angles for luxury product presentation
Render review-ready visuals, refine surfaces and highlights, then complete final QA before delivery
cases.pipeline: A structured CGI pipeline from asset preparation to lighting, rendering, review, retouching coordination and final delivery, built to support scalable product content without losing luxury-grade consistency.
cases.role: 3D content production support, asset preparation, lighting/render consistency and CGI pipeline execution.
cases.tools: 3ds Max, Photoshop, PlayCanvas, Substance Painter, Blender
proofPoints: Premium product visuals for global market use
Scalable 3D workflow for repeated asset production

cases.title: Automotive Media Library & CGI Asset System
cases.client: Leading Italian motor company via CLX Europe
cases.summary: A centralized visual asset library for a leading Italian motor brand, built to improve content delivery, streamline workflows and support global collaboration.
cases.caseStudy: The case centered on organizing automotive visuals into a reusable media-library system so brand, marketing and regional teams could access consistent assets faster and reduce duplicate production effort.
workflow: Audit asset needs across vehicle imagery, campaign usage and regional delivery requirements
Prepare, classify and quality-check media assets for library-ready use
Support a delivery workflow that made visuals easier to find, review, reuse and distribute
cases.pipeline: A media-production pipeline built around asset intake, organization, visual QA, metadata-ready delivery and stakeholder handoff for high-volume automotive content.
cases.role: CGI/media asset workflow support with emphasis on organized delivery, visual consistency and stakeholder-ready content.
cases.tools: 3D production workflow, media-library systems, rendering QA, asset delivery
proofPoints: Structured media library for high-volume brand assets
Improved delivery workflow for distributed teams

cases.title: Ecommerce Furniture Product Renderings
cases.summary: Product-rendering work for ecommerce furniture presentation, created to support clean catalogue visuals, consistent angles and shopper-friendly product clarity.
cases.caseStudy: The ecommerce case focused on turning sofa product requirements into clean, listing-ready rendered visuals that help shoppers understand shape, material, scale and finish without relying only on photography.
workflow: Blueprint: reviewed product dimensions, references and required catalogue views
Modeling: built clean sofa geometry in 3ds Max for ecommerce presentation
Texturing: created fabric, cushion, wood and surface material treatments
Look dev: refined lighting, camera angles, scale and product readability
Rendering: produced V-Ray outputs with consistent shadows and product clarity
Post process: polished color, contrast and final catalogue presentation
QA: checked angles, material consistency and ecommerce-ready delivery
cases.pipeline: Brief retail CGI pipeline: blueprint, modeling, texturing, look dev, rendering, post process and QA for consistent ecommerce product imagery.
cases.role: 3D product rendering in 3ds Max using V-Ray, with focus on furniture materials, lighting, camera setup and ecommerce-ready output.
cases.tools: 3ds Max, V-Ray, material setup, lighting, ecommerce rendering
proofPoints: Retail-focused product imagery for sofa listings
Consistent lighting, materials and viewing angles
Strong proof point for soft-material and furniture-product CGI

leadershipSection.title: I reduce creative risk by owning motion from brief to shipped asset.
leadershipSection.description: For senior motion roles, the value is not only polished animation. I bring the operating layer around the work: translating briefs, planning production, leading people, setting review standards, managing feedback and shipping assets that are ready for product, learning, brand and stakeholder teams.

strengths.title: Motion Leadership
strengths.description: Led and coordinated a 10+ person creative team across design, animation, editing, audio, SFX and delivery tasks.

strengths.title: Product Storytelling
strengths.description: Turn product, learning and brand briefs into clear narratives, visual flows, storyboards and motion-ready execution plans.

strengths.title: Pipeline Ownership
strengths.description: Built repeatable workflows for Gen AI visuals, motion graphics, audio prep, edit reviews, final QA and handoff.

strengths.title: Stakeholder Delivery
strengths.description: Managed feedback loops, quality checks, consistency standards and final exports so teams could ship reliably.

strengths.title: Production Velocity
strengths.description: Improved delivery speed by building reusable structures, review checkpoints and AI-assisted production workflows.

strengths.title: Quality Control
strengths.description: Own final checks across pacing, audio sync, visual consistency, export settings and stakeholder-ready delivery.

caseStudy.label: Case Study
caseStudy.title: Motion Systems for Product, Learning and Brand Teams
caseStudy.description: Production-grade modules and motion assets led through brief, story, storyboard, Gen AI workflow, animation, SFX, QA and delivery.

hero.body: I help product, learning and brand teams turn complex ideas into clear motion systems, explainers and launch-ready video assets. 6+ years across motion leadership, 300+ videos and course assets produced, 10+ person creative teams led, and end-to-end ownership across story, storyboard, Gen AI workflows, animation, audio, SFX, QA and stakeholder-ready delivery.
